历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category/Science was approximately 32607 → 33553 → 45054 → 30910 → 33884. In 2023, it dropped to 45054 due to geology and mining majors, but returned to the 30910–33884 range in 2024–2025. The recent two-year baseline is around 33884, showing an overall backward trend. The provincial Physics Category/Science enrollment plan was 48 in 2021 → 60 in 2022 → 60 in 2023 → 62 in 2024 → 48 in 2025 → 62 in 2026. Compared to 2025, the 2026 plan expands by about 29%, easing competition and expected to push the ranking further back.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 77th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, stable in the 72–81 range in recent years, with no significant change in university level. In 2024, reputation was slightly negative (campus safety incident), but no new negative public opinion emerged in the 2025–2026 cycle. Douyin heat ranking is 88th, rated as 'average', with medium-low short video exposure, not forming a clear signal of increased application attention. Chemistry is an A- discipline, the only A- or above discipline at Fuzhou University; Chemical Engineering and Technology, Materials Science and Engineering, and other majors closely related to chemistry have some appeal to relevant candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering and Automation remain highly popular and recommended. Fuzhou University offers these majors, attracting strong candidate interest. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Anhui Province is about 451,000, slightly down from about 462,000 in 2025, with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 313,000, slightly easing competition pressure. No significant fluctuations occurred. Fuzhou University is located in Fujian Province, with moderate geographical distance from Anhui Province, and no significant regional preference effect for non-provincial candidates. The university's enrollment scale in Anhui is medium, with 62 Physics Category slots in 2026, a small proportion, limiting regional influence.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 33884, the 2026 enrollment expansion to 62 (about 29% increase), a slight decrease in provincial Physics Category candidates, stable university reputation, and sustained popularity of engineering majors, the ranking is expected to shift back significantly due to the expansion effect, but partially offset by the slight decrease in total candidates and major popularity. The predicted 2026 minimum ranking is approximately 39914, with a range of 39414–40414.

For rankings near the upper bound (e.g., outside 40000), prioritize Tier 2 majors and pair with Fujian-Taiwan cooperation programs as safety.
